quote: JOSE HELPED ME AND MY GIRLFRIEND WITH OUR MOVE. HE ARRIVED ON TIME, WAS PREPARED, AND WAS VERY HELPFUL! HIS EXPERIENCE CAME IN HANDY ON A COUPLE OCCASIONS AND HIS EFFICIENCY MADE THE MOVE QUICK AND EASY. WILL DEFINITELY BE CONTACTING JOSE FOR OUR NEXT MOVE OR HANDY WORK IF NEEDED! BEST, ALEX
name: Alex Azzi

quote: JOSE WAS EXTREMELY PROFESSIONAL AND DID A FANTASTIC JOB INSTALLING MY KITCHEN AND DINING LIGHT FIXTURES AS WELL AS MY 65 INCH TV. I WOULD RECOMMEND HIS SERVICES IF YOU ARE LOOKING FOR A PROFESSIONAL WHO TAKES THE TIME TO ENSURE THE JOB IS DONE PERFECTLY.
name: Amanda Zaragoza

quote: JOSE CAME OVER TO HIDE WIRES IN THE WALL AND HANG UP LARGE ITEMS, AND PATCH & PAINT SOME HOLES. HE WORKS QUICKLY AND EFFICIENTLY AND IS VERY TIDY WITH HIS WORK SPACE. HE PAYS ATTENTION TO DETAIL AND MAKES SURE EVERYTHING IS PERFECT. I WAS VERY IMPRESSED AND HAPPY WITH EVERYTHING THAT HE DID AND WILL CERTAINLY BE CALLING HIM FOR OTHER PROJECTS. HIGHLY RECOMMEND!
name: Effie L

quote: Jose is a friendly, strong and highly skilled handyman. He has the best state-of-the-art laser equipment to make sure that everything is perfectly aligned and straight. He hung a triptych (3 paintings in one) for our living room wall using his precise laser tool. The job was perfect. And his prices are affordable. I look forward to hiring him again to do more work on our house.
name: Jolie K
